sidebar.clearAllDataDescription: This will permanently delete all uploads, transactions, budgets, and classification rules. Categories will be kept. This action cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.errorLoadingHint: Make sure the API is running: from the backend folder run uvicorn on port 8000, then refresh. Open the app via the Vite dev URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:5173) so /api requests are proxied.
dashboard.backendUnreachableBanner: Could not reach the API (backend may be stopped). This is not related to file upload. Start the backend on port 8000 and use npm run dev so /api is proxied. After the API is up, refresh the page.
dashboard.annualOverviewTrendHint: The line follows the same monthly totals as the bars. Labels show month-over-month % change in spend (when the prior month had data).
dashboard.clickMonthHint: Select a row or bar to see that month below.
dashboard.categoryCarouselHeading: By category (tap a chart for merchant breakdown)
dashboard.categoryDrilldownEmpty: No merchant or group data for this category in this period.
dashboard.drilldownSubcategoryHint: Spend without a subcategory is shown under the category name. Slices marked “Other” group smaller subcategories.
dashboard.drilldownSubcategoryEmpty: No subcategory data for this category.
dashboard.drilldownMerchantHint: Statement lines in the same spend group appear under the group name instead of each line separately.
dashboard.monthPieSubcategoryEmpty: No data for this category in this month.
dashboard.monthPieSubcategoryHint: Spend without a subcategory appears under the category name.
dashboard.monthPieSubcategoryClickHint: Click a category in the chart or list to see its subcategory breakdown for the selected month.

upload.title: Upload report
upload.statementMonthHint: Everything is stored under the month you choose here. When the file name includes the billing cycle (e.g. 11_2025 = charged in November), we set the spend month to the previous calendar month (October) automatically. You can still change the month in the dropdown.
upload.filenameMonthConflict: Files suggest different months — using the first file’s date.
upload.mergeHint: Partial mid-month exports are fine. Re-uploading the same month adds new rows; identical lines are skipped. You can upload several .xls files in one go (e.g. multiple cards).
upload.replaceHint: Use “replace” only when you want the uploaded file(s) to become the full source of truth for that month. With multiple files, existing data is cleared once, then every file is imported in order.
upload.enrichOnlyHint: Re-upload the same .xls to attach Excel row numbers and a downloadable file to existing rows for the selected month. Categories are not changed. You will see a summary if some rows exist only in the database or only in the file.
upload.enrichDoneToast: Source data updated for {{enriched}} row(s) across {{files}} file(s).
upload.enrichConflictToast: Mismatches: {{dbOnly}} row(s) only in database, {{fileOnly}} only in file (see API response for samples).
upload.replaceCheckbox: Replace all existing data for this month
upload.confirmReplaceDescriptionOne: All uploads and transactions for {{month}} will be permanently deleted, then this file will be imported. This cannot be undone.
upload.confirmReplaceDescriptionMany: All uploads and transactions for {{month}} will be permanently deleted, then {{fileCount}} files will be imported. This cannot be undone.
upload.selectFileHint: Select one or more files (Ctrl/Cmd+click or Shift+click).
upload.invalidFileType: Only .xls files are supported (skipped unsupported names)
upload.monthsIntro: Upload one or more .xls reports for the month you choose — the app does not infer the month from the file name. Progress stays visible in the top bar if you switch pages.
upload.jobParallelNote: Files upload to the server in parallel. Mapping and categorization run only after all uploads finish, in tracked steps.
upload.jobErrorRefreshLost: The page was reloaded during a job; please start the upload again.
upload.jobErrorNoFiles: No files were available for this job.
upload.jobAlreadyRunning: An import job is already running. Wait for it to finish or dismiss it from the bar above.

categorizeStage.queue: {{count}} transactions waiting to be categorized across server batches.
categorizeStage.rules_dictionary: Rules and keyword dictionary: scanning {{rows}} row(s) in this batch…
categorizeStage.llm_queue: AI model: {{unique}} unique merchant line(s) from {{rows}} row(s); about {{batchesTotal}} model call(s) for this batch…
categorizeStage.llm_batch: AI model: call {{batch}} of {{batchesTotal}} for this batch…
categorizeStage.classification_local: Local classification only for this batch ({{rows}} row(s)); no AI calls.
categorizeStage.skipped_llm_pending_user: Rules and dictionary applied; {{rows}} row(s) left for manual review or optional AI (Needs Review page).

review.title: Needs Review
review.propagateHint: {{count}} rows here share this description. Save updates every matching transaction and sets the category for future imports.
review.emptyTitle: No transactions to review this month 🎉
review.aiSuggestDescription: This sends up to {{limit}} uncategorized rows for this month to the language model. You can still edit results afterward.

transactionSource.title: Source in Excel
transactionSource.description: Open the original statement file and go to the row shown (first sheet). The browser cannot jump inside Excel automatically.
transactionSource.downloadTimeout: Download timed out. Check your connection and try again.
transactionSource.noFile: No file stored for this row (upload before this feature or run “source enrichment”).
transactionSource.excelHint: In Excel, use Go To (Ctrl+G) or the name box to jump to the row number.

transactionsTable.title: Transactions
transactionsTable.userLockedTitle: You set this; auto-categorize will not change it
transactionsTable.legend: Row tint: blue = recurring monthly spend; purple = one-time (e.g. abroad). Amber border = same merchant text but different categories. Change anytime from the list.
transactionsTable.categoryConflictTitle: This merchant line appears under more than one category (or mixed with uncategorized). Pick one category to align all rows.
transactionsTable.categoryConflictBanner: {{count}} transaction(s) in this view: same merchant line, different categories. Update the category on one row to propagate.
transactionsTable.categoryPropagateHint: Same merchant line as in the statement: this updates every matching row and future uploads.
transactionsTable.categoryPropagated: {{count}} transaction(s) updated for this merchant; new uploads will use this category.
transactionsTable.groupedCapHint: Showing up to 500 transactions for this month. Narrow filters or switch views if some rows are missing.

merchantGroups.hint: Rows are grouped by the same statement line (trimmed description, case-insensitive), across every month you uploaded. Approving moves a group below; unapprove brings it back. Changing category still updates every matching transaction.
merchantGroups.categoryConflictBanner: {{count}} merchant line(s) have conflicting categories in the database. Use the category picker to align them.

subcategories.pickCategory: Choose a category, then add or remove subcategories (e.g. fruits, meat).
subcategories.needCategoryFirst: Set a category on the transaction first

merchantSpendGroups.title: Spend groups
merchantSpendGroups.intro: Merge several statement lines under one label (same normalized text as categorization: trim + lowercase). Use this for fuel across stations, etc. Groups appear in category drilldowns and the forecast.
merchantSpendGroups.confirmDeleteGroup: Delete this group and its member lines?
merchantSpendGroups.selectGroupHint: Select a group on the left.
merchantSpendGroups.patternHint: Exact line: trimmed, lowercase (as in rules). Two words (e.g. paz yellow) adds every line that contains both, in any order. Use * and ? for wildcards (e.g. *paz*).
merchantSpendGroups.memberNoMatch: No statement lines matched this pattern
merchantSpendGroups.memberSkippedInGroup: {{count}} line(s) were already in this group
merchantSpendGroups.memberBlockedOtherGroup: {{count}} line(s) are in another group and were skipped
merchantSpendGroups.noMembers: No lines in this group yet.
merchantSpendGroups.drilldownTrendTitle: Spend group trend (same period as chart above)
merchantSpendGroups.syncSuccess: Synced {{processed}} spend-group line(s); {{newCount}} new approval(s) created.

categoryMerchants.title: Categories & merchants
categoryMerchants.subtitle: Pick a category to see every merchant line (normalized) mapped to it. Move a merchant to another category or subcategory; matching rows across all months update via a classification rule.
categoryMerchants.pickCategoryHint: Choose a category above to list merchants.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.noBudgetsHint: Set monthly budgets per category to track your spending.

recurring.title: Recurring & Subscriptions
recurring.subtitle: Merchants that appear 3+ months in the selected window
recurring.emptyHint: Upload at least 3 months of statements to detect recurring charges.

dataQuality.title: Data Quality
dataQuality.topUncategorizedHint: These merchants account for the most uncategorized spend. Categorizing them will have the biggest impact.

cardTrends.title: Spend by Card
cardTrends.subtitle: Per-card breakdown with trends and category distribution
cardTrends.noCardsHint: Upload statements to see per-card spend analysis.

rules.title: Classification Rules
rules.subtitle: Manage automatic transaction categorization rules
rules.emptyHint: Create rules to automatically categorize transactions by pattern matching.
rules.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete this rule. Existing transactions will not be uncategorized.

export.title: Export
export.subtitle: Download transaction data as CSV
export.noDataHint: No transactions found for this month.
export.serverHint: Server-side export with all enriched columns
export.footer: The exported CSV includes: ID, Month, Date, Description, Amount, Currency, Category, Subcategory, Card, Section, Spend Pattern, Confidence, and Needs Review status. Opens in Excel, Google Sheets, and most spreadsheet applications.

monthsPage.title: Months
monthsPage.clickToAddOrChange: Click to add or change files
monthsPage.dropHint: Drop .xls file(s) here or click to browse
monthsPage.dropSubhint: Multiple files supported — progress appears in the bar above
monthsPage.noUploads: No uploads yet. Add your first statement above.
